error: Pre-result adversarial review found fail-open receipt semantics and stage-order enforcement; source repair and setup regeneration are required before scientific execution.
findings: generic receipt identity validation omits model, revision, and backend fields and accepts implicit verdict status
positive-control consumers do not re-enforce exact authorization, access, and scientific-evidence claims
branch authorization accepts status and phase without status-specific semantics or canonical path binding
full-rank state-only ancestry can be satisfied by an unrelated nested copy instead of the registered authorization chain
checkpoint and analysis consumers do not revalidate exact G0 and positive-control pass semantics
trigger evaluation lacks all-arm fixed-final and terminal training-receipt barriers
some content payloads open before receipt-only authorization preflight completes
